claim_bullets.bullet_text: Items have specific rarities, enchanters, forms, and base trade prices. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.252-256)
Many items have penalties for repeated use within a day. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.252-256)
Some items require conditions to be effective, such as mental power resistance. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.252-256)
Certain items are consumable or have limited use. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.252-256)
Some items can be combined for greater effects. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.252-256)

source_record_text: Magical item list from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, section 14.4, pages 252-256. This section details various magical items including rings, bags, gloves, orbs, and other enchanted objects with specific powers and limitations, with some items having unknown effects or restrictions.
